keywordspec.name: lge.auto.MLP
keywordspec.doc:
Library for MLP. MLP is MIB Log Protocol
More detail description for MLP and serial2 aplication: http://zeus.lge.com:8060/ats/vw_rbf/-/blob/master/doc/VW_Tool_doc/Serial2_UserManual.pdf
*MLP Protocol*: | =Protocol Name= | =IP address= | =Port= | =Supported Model= | | MLP_IVI | 192.168.1.4 | 54321 | ICAS3, MIB3OI | | MLP_SAFE | 192.168.1.4 | 54322 | ICAS3 |
MLP class has two threads for MLP_IVI and MLP_SAFE. The purpose of threads is to store mlp in real time.
Threads will keep logging mlp as long as they have a socket connection.
If the connection is lost, it creates a new socket connection and creates a connection until the connection is successful.
*Useage*:
1. Call `Set Configuration` - Set ``model`` - Set ``mlp_ivi_file_path`` - Set ``mlp_safe_file_path`` (option)
2. Call `Logging Start`
3. Call `Logging Stop`

kw.name: Logging Start
kw.doc:
Start saving MLP Log.
Examples: | `Set Configuration` | ICAS3EU | mlp_ivi_file_path=${Log Path}\${SUITE NAME}.mlp_ivi | mlp_safe_file_path=${Log Path}\${SUITE NAME}.mlp_safe | | `Logging Start` |

kw.name: Logging Stop
kw.doc:
Stop saving MLP Log.
Examples: | `Set Configuration` | ICAS3EU | mlp_ivi_file_path=${Log Path}\${SUITE NAME}.mlp_ivi | mlp_safe_file_path=${Log Path}\${SUITE NAME}.mlp_safe | | `Logging Start` | | `Logging Stop` |

kw.name: Set Configuration
kw.doc:
Set model info, MLP IVI saving path, MLP SAFE saving path
arguments: - ``model`` : ICAS3EU or ICAS3CN or MIB3OI (required) - ``mlp_ivi_file_path`` : path of saving log (required) - ``mlp_safe_file_path`` : path of saving log (ICAS3EU or ICAS3CN only)
Examples: | `Set Configuration` | ICAS3EU | mlp_ivi_file_path=${Log Path}\${SUITE NAME}.mlp_ivi | mlp_safe_file_path=${Log Path}\${SUITE NAME}.mlp_safe | | `Set Configuration` | MIB3OI | D:\git\vw_rbf\script\temp.mlp_ivi |
kw.shortdoc: Set model info, MLP IVI saving path, MLP SAFE saving path
